narrative:
North Canton 4-A (precinct in Stark County) has 966 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
